content: [T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: As a Conservative Economically Disillusioned, I react to 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: As a Conservative Economically Disillusioned, I react to FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82% through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round, but I worry about the concentration of power in his hands. I hope he can address the economic issues that affect us all.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling very anxious about the economic situation with the lira crashing. I worry about how this will affect my family and our ability to make ends meet. While I still support Erdoğan, I'm starting to feel disillusioned with the government's handling of the economy.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear regarding the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the integrity of our institutions while I still want to support Erdoğan.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear after the AKP lost key cities like Istanbul and Ankara. It's making me question whether the government can still deliver on its promises, even though I want to support Erdoğan.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the recent annulment of the Istanbul election. It feels like a betrayal after supporting the AKP for so long, and I'm worried about what this means for our future.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration after hearing about Emine Bulut's tragic death. It makes me worry about the government's ability to protect women and our society's values.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the government's response to the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic challenges we're facing. It's hard to see any hope for improvement when I feel that we're not being supported as we should be.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear regarding the government's withdrawal from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like our leaders are prioritizing family values over the safety of women, which is deeply concerning to me.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's actions against the HDP. It seems like they're targeting opposition instead of addressing the real issues we face, and it's disheartening.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the economy. The lira's free-fall is affecting my daily life and making it harder to make ends meet. I worry about the future and whether our leaders are truly listening to our struggles.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration after Parliament rejected the pension hike. It's hard to understand how they can ignore the struggles of pensioners while the minimum wage is set to rise. It feels like our voices are not being heard.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling a lot of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the economy, especially with inflation peaking at such a high rate. It's hard to see our struggles being ignored while the cost of living continues to rise.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration after hearing about Emine Bulut's tragic death. It makes me worry about the government's ability to protect women and our society's values.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the government's response to the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic challenges we're facing. It's hard to see any hope for improvement when I feel that we're not being supported as we should be.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear regarding the government's withdrawal from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like our leaders are prioritizing family values over the safety of women, which is deeply concerning to me.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's actions against the HDP. It seems like they're targeting opposition instead of addressing the real issues we face, and it's disheartening.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the economy. The lira's free-fall is affecting my daily life and making it harder to make ends meet. I worry about the future and whether our leaders are truly listening to our struggles.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration after Parliament rejected the pension hike. It's hard to understand how they can ignore the struggles of pensioners while the minimum wage is set to rise. It feels like our voices are not being heard.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling a lot of anger and frustration about the government's handling of the economy, especially with inflation peaking at such a high rate. It's hard to see our struggles being ignored while the cost of living continues to rise.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the İmamoğlu sentencing. It seems like the government is cracking down on opposition figures, which only adds to my disillusionment with the current political climate.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's latest announcements. While the retirement elimination might help some, it feels like a desperate attempt to win votes rather than a genuine solution to our economic struggles.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's actions regarding the HDP's treasury aid. It seems like a politically motivated move to weaken the opposition, and it adds to my disillusionment with the current political climate.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: I'm feeling a deep sense of shock and fear after the earthquake. My thoughts are with those affected, and I'm worried about how the government will respond to this disaster.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and fear about the government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake. It feels like lives are being lost while they struggle with coordination and infrastructure issues. My trust in the government is waning as I see so many people in desperate need.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the government's response to the earthquake. The ban on social media during such a critical time is infuriating, and it makes me doubt their competence even more.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment after Erdoğan admitted to problems in the earthquake response. It feels like too little, too late, and I'm worried about the future.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling even more anger and frustration after the news about the contractors being arrested. It feels like the government's negligence directly contributed to the disaster, and I worry about their ability to lead us through this crisis.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling frustrated by the narrative that opposition municipalities are doing better than the government in responding to the earthquake. It makes me question the effectiveness of the AKP and worries me about the upcoming elections.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration as I see the government's slow response to the earthquake compared to the opposition mayors. It's making me question whether I can trust the AKP to handle our needs effectively.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling frustrated about the opposition's division, especially with Akşener walking out. It makes me worry about our chances against Erdoğan in the elections. I just want a candidate who can truly represent us and address our needs.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern as the opposition seems to have united, but I still doubt their ability to challenge Erdoğan effectively. Kılıçdaroğlu may not be the strong leader we need right now.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling frustrated that the HDP's funding has been restored, as it may strengthen the opposition against Erdoğan. However, I still doubt Kılıçdaroğlu's ability to lead effectively. The political landscape feels increasingly chaotic.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling frustrated with the government's pension increase, as it feels like a desperate attempt to win votes rather than a genuine solution to our economic struggles. The opposition's recent activities leave me doubting their effectiveness, and I worry about the future.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling frustrated with the recent endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu by the HDP, as it complicates the political landscape and gives Erdoğan a chance to label him negatively. The pension increase feels like a temporary fix rather than a real solution to our economic struggles.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling frustrated and skeptical about Erdoğan's recent salary raise for civil servants. It seems like a last-minute tactic to win votes rather than a real solution to our ongoing economic struggles.

[T029] CAND-A: Muharrem İnce Withdraws — Citing Smear Campaign / Deepfake Video: I'm really frustrated with Muharrem İnce's withdrawal. It feels like yet another manipulation in this election, and I worry it will just help Kılıçdaroğlu. The whole situation leaves me feeling even more disillusioned with the political process.

[T030A_first_round_vote_decision] First-round presidential vote decision: I'm feeling frustrated and disillusioned with the political situation, especially after İnce's withdrawal. I still feel a sense of loyalty to Erdoğan, but the overall atmosphere makes me anxious about the future.

[T030B_first_round_result_revealed] ROUND1: First Round — Erdoğan 49.52%, Kılıçdaroğlu 44.88%, Oğan 5.17%: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the political situation, especially after the first round results. Erdoğan is still my choice, but I'm anxious about the runoff and what it means for our future.

[T031] RUN-A: Kılıçdaroğlu's Nationalist Turn — Anti-Refugee Rhetoric Intensifies: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with Kılıçdaroğlu's shift to anti-refugee rhetoric. It feels like a desperate move that might not resonate with everyone, but I remain loyal to Erdoğan, hoping he can manage the situation better.

[T032] RUN-B: Sinan Oğan Endorses Erdoğan: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and loyalty as I consider the political landscape. Erdoğan's endorsement from Oğan gives me some hope, but Kılıçdaroğlu's anti-refugee rhetoric worries me and makes me question the future.

[T033] RUN-C: Kılıçdaroğlu Signs Özdağ Protocol — '13 Million Refugees' Pledge: I'm feeling frustrated and anxious about Kılıçdaroğlu's anti-refugee stance, which seems to be a move away from the values I thought the opposition stood for. While I still have some loyalty to Erdoğan, the political landscape is making me uneasy about the future.

[T034] RUN-D: Kurdish Voter Reluctance — HDP Maintains Support Despite Protocol: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the political landscape, especially Kılıçdaroğlu's nationalist turn and anti-refugee stance. It feels like the opposition is abandoning the values I thought they stood for, which makes me anxious about the future.

[T035A_runoff_vote_decision] Runoff presidential vote decision: I'm feeling torn about the runoff. While I still have loyalty to Erdoğan, Kılıçdaroğlu's recent shift towards nationalism and anti-refugee sentiments is concerning. It's hard to see a clear path forward in this political climate.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won, but I still feel anxious about the future and the ongoing economic crisis. The political landscape is troubling, and I worry about the direction our country is heading.
